title: Transfer and Portability Deck
concept: A table-led WordPress Playground operations deck that treats browser save, local directory save, GitHub import/export, ZIP import/download, database download, and Blueprint bundle actions as one transfer system with a persistent selected-detail panel and protected live preview.
focus: stateful saved, local, imported, exported, deleted, and reset rows
route-specific PR and branch preview completion
flows: Finish destructive delete end to end with warning, cancel support, confirmation progress, row deleting state, final row removal, transfer history entry, and active-site fallback to an Unsaved Playground when needed.

Finish PR or branch preview end to end with WordPress PR and Gutenberg PR/branch inputs, validation, loading, resulting preview identity, active path update, save/export availability, table mutation, and live preview update.

Save the active temporary Playground in browser storage or to a local directory with distinct destination copy, folder permission grant or denial, file-copy progress, slug or folder identity, reset/reload consequence, and same-row transformation.
Manage saved, unsaved, browser-backed, local-directory, imported, exported, and transfer rows with open, manage, rename, delete, reset, and result states.
Use Site Manager Settings, Files, Blueprint, Database, and Logs while Homepage, WP Admin, path navigation, refresh, Save, Export to GitHub, and Download as zip remain visible.
Browse a representative subset of 6 of 43 captured Blueprint gallery entries with current categories/search, selected detail, Blueprint URL, editor, copy, download, run, validation, and result state.

Run portability actions for GitHub import/export, ZIP import/download, database.sqlite download, Adminer, phpMyAdmin, and Blueprint bundle copy/download/run with transfer history and selected-object updates.
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start
WordPress PR preview with PR number or URL
Gutenberg PR or branch preview with PR, URL, or branch name
GitHub import with account connection and token-not-stored consequence
Blueprint URL runner
Import .zip with native chooser framing, validation, replacement warning, progress, and imported result
Blueprint gallery categories and search with honest representative subset of 43
Featured Blueprint shortcuts including Art Gallery, Coffee Shop, Feed Reader with the Friends Plugin, Gaming News, Non-profit Organization, and Personal Blog
Save in this browser with progress and browser slug identity
Save to a local directory with folder permission, denial, progress, folder identity, and reconnect consequence
Saved and unsaved Playground list
Open and manage saved Playgrounds
Rename saved Playground
Delete saved Playground with confirmation, cancel, progress, final row removal, and active fallback
Current shell path input and refresh
Homepage and WP Admin shortcuts
Temporary, saved, local permission, imported, exported, deleting, and reset states
WordPress version, PHP version, language, older versions, network access, and multisite settings
Destructive Apply Settings and Reset Playground and stored Save and Reload behavior
Site Manager tabs for Settings, Files, Blueprint, Database, and Logs
File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse files, selected file/editor, dirty state, save, and result state
Blueprint editor with copy link, download bundle, run, validation, and result state
SQLite-backed database driver, path, size, database.sqlite download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with empty and notice states
Export to GitHub
Download as .zip
Transfer history for database, ZIP, GitHub, and Blueprint bundle actions
